mapper.select: SELECT MAX(POLICY_NO) FROM tb_policy WHERE POLICY_NO LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_policy ( POLICY_NO, MEMBER_ID, LIST_NO, PRODUCT_CODE, POLICY_STATUS, INSURED_NAME, INSURED_IDENTITY_CARD, INSURED_GENDER, INSURED_BIRTHDAY, INSURED_AMOUNT, POLICY_MOBILE, PREMIUM_AMOUNT, AGENT_ID, RISK_LEVEL, EFFECT_DATE, EXPIRE_DATE, APPLY_TIME, UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{policyNo}, #{memberId}, #{listNo}, #{productCode}, #{policyStatus}, #{insuredName}, #{insuredIdentityCard}, #{insuredGender}, #{insuredBirthday}, #{insuredAmount}, #{policyMobile}, #{premiumAmount}, #{agentId}, #{riskLevel}, #{effectDate}, #{expireDate}, #{applyTime}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT POLICY_NO AS policyNo, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, LIST_NO AS listNo, PRODUCT_CODE AS productCode, POLICY_STATUS AS policyStatus, INSURED_NAME AS insuredName, INSURED_IDENTITY_CARD AS insuredIdentityCard, INSURED_GENDER AS insuredGender, INSURED_BIRTHDAY AS insuredBirthday, INSURED_AMOUNT AS insuredAmount, POLICY_MOBILE AS policyMobile, PREMIUM_AMOUNT AS premiumAmount, AGENT_ID AS agentId, RISK_LEVEL AS riskLevel, EFFECT_DATE AS effectDate, EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate, APPLY_TIME AS applyTime, CREATE_TIME AS createTime, UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime, UPDATE_USER AS updateUser FROM tb_policy WHERE POLICY_NO = #{applicationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_policy SET PRODUCT_CODE = #{productCode}, INSURED_NAME = #{insuredName}, INSURED_IDENTITY_CARD = #{insuredIdentityCard}, INSURED_GENDER = #{insuredGender}, INSURED_BIRTHDAY = #{insuredBirthday}, INSURED_AMOUNT = #{insuredAmount}, POLICY_MOBILE = #{policyMobile}, PREMIUM_AMOUNT = #{premiumAmount}, POLICY_STATUS = #{policyStatus}, UPDATE_TIME = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UPDATE_USER = #{updateUser} WHERE POLICY_NO = #{policyNo} AND POLICY_STATUS = 'RETURN'
